validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_hip-api' appears in category at least 1500 times in table events_args
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events_args WHERE category = 'rocm_hip_api';
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_hip-api' category entries are fewer than expected in events_args

validation_queries.description: Check for missing category entries
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events_args WHERE category IS NULL OR TRIM(category) = '';
validation_queries.error_message: Empty or NULL category entries found in events_args

validation_queries.description: Ensure event_id and arg_position are non-negative
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events_args WHERE event_id < 0 OR arg_position < 0;
validation_queries.error_message: Negative values found in event_id or arg_position in events_args

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_hip-api' appears in category at least 500 times in table regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_hip_api';
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_hip-api' category entries are fewer than expected in regions

validation_queries.description: Check for any NULL values in the 'name' column of regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE name IS NULL;
validation_queries.error_message: NULL entries found in the name column of regions

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_hip_api' string is present in the table
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%rocm_hip_api%';
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_hip_api' string not found in the table rocpd_string

validation_queries.description: Check existence of name_id = 7

validation_queries.error_message: name_id 7 is missing from rocpd_region

validation_queries.description: Validate timing for name_id = 7
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_region WHERE name_id = 7 AND start > 0 AND end > 0 AND (end - start) >= 0;
